scenario.name: VoiceBot DTMF IVR Test
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=DTMF Test c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=1 Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=2 Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=0 Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 5 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=* Duration=160

INFO sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 6 INFO Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]
Signal=# Duration=160

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "DTMF Test" <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 7 BYE Contact: <sip:dtmftest@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
